name: TOP_ORIGIN_BY_DIVERSITY
description: Top origin by diversity. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (o:Origin {name: $origin})<-[:ORIGIN_FROM]-(a:Assignee)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]->(tp:TargetPair)
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT tp) AS targetpair_diversity, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY targetpair_diversity DESC, patent_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: Which organizations or individuals from EU have the greatest diversity of target pairs in their patent filings?
Which organizations or individuals from Other have the greatest diversity of target pairs in their patent filings?
Which organizations or individuals from JP have the greatest diversity of target pairs in their patent filings?
